meta.title: What percentile is your IQ?
meta.description: Psychometric-grade 30-question IQ test. Get your estimated IQ and category strengths in 7 minutes. Detailed PDF report for $7.50.

landing.headline:
What percentile
is your IQ?
landing.sub:
Psychometric-grade 30 questions in about 7 minutes.
Objectively measure your strengths across 4 domains.
landing.disclaimer: Estimated score, not a clinical diagnosis.

test.leaveConfirm: Your test will be lost. Leave anyway?
test.noBack: You cannot return to previous questions.

result.title: Your Estimated IQ
result.lockNotice: Full breakdown delivered as a PDF after purchase.
result.shareText: I scored top {pct}% on the estimated IQ test! How about you?
result.disclaimer: Estimated score, not a medical diagnosis.
result.summaryHookHigh: Excellent — your score is well above the average range.
result.summaryHookMid: Solid score with clear strengths and areas to develop.
result.summaryHookLow: Plenty of potential here — explore your category breakdown.
